items.title: World's Tallest Leprechaun St Patricks Day T Shirt | Irish Pride St Patty's Day Shirts | Graphic T Shirts for Men & Women
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: world's, tallest, leprechaun, patricks, day, irish, pride, patty's, shirts, women. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
